get.summary: Places playlists in a folder or at the root and sets their position.
get.description: OpenSubsonic extension name `playlistFolders` (as returned by `getOpenSubsonicExtensions`). Places playlists in the authenticated user's playlist organization: moves them into a folder or to the root and sets their position among siblings. Never modifies the playlists themselves, so it works on any playlist visible to the user regardless of ownership or `readonly` state. At least one of `playlistFolderId` or `sortOrder` must be supplied.

parameters.name: playlistId
parameters.description: ID of the playlist to place. Multiple parameters allowed; playlists are placed in the order given.

parameters.name: playlistFolderId
parameters.description: ID of the destination folder. An empty value moves the playlists to the root. Omit to keep each playlist in its current location and only change its position.

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: Position among siblings, as a client-assigned integer. Multiple parameters allowed, paired in order with `playlistId`. When omitted, moved playlists are placed after the existing contents of the destination.

post.summary: Places playlists in a folder or at the root and sets their position.
post.description:
OpenSubsonic extension name `playlistFolders` (as returned by `getOpenSubsonicExtensions`). Places playlists in the authenticated user's playlist organization: moves them into a folder or to the root and sets their position among siblings. Never modifies the playlists themselves, so it works on any playlist visible to the user regardless of ownership or `readonly` state. At least one of `playlistFolderId` or `sortOrder` must be supplied.

Requires OpenSubsonic extension name `formPost` (as returned by `getOpenSubsonicExtensions`).

playlistId.description: ID of the playlist to place. Multiple parameters allowed; playlists are placed in the order given.

playlistFolderId.description: ID of the destination folder. An empty value moves the playlists to the root. Omit to keep each playlist in its current location and only change its position.

sortOrder.description: Position among siblings, as a client-assigned integer. Multiple parameters allowed, paired in order with `playlistId`. When omitted, moved playlists are placed after the existing contents of the destination.
